---
title: "Home"
format: html
editor: visual
---

---
title: "Home"
---

# Brandon Bishop

Welcome to my environmental data analytics portfolio. This site highlights selected R-based projects focused on water quality analysis, environmental data interpretation, and scientific visualization.

## Featured Project

### Virginia Stream Water Quality Analysis Using R

This project analyzes Virginia stream water quality data with a focus on nitrate concentrations. It includes data cleaning, descriptive statistics, ANOVA, chi-square analysis, and professional visualizations created in R.

[View the project](README.html)

## Skills Featured

-   Data cleaning and wrangling in R
-   Environmental data analysis
-   Statistical testing
-   Data visualization
-   Reproducible project organization
